titleStmt.title: SII 9.402: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 402. (A.R. No. 483 of 1906.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE BHIMESVARA TEMPLE AT CHAUDURU, PRODDATUR TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 1114, Parīdhāvi, Chaitra, śu. 1, Sōmavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1192 March 16 Monday in the reign of the Chōḷa chief Na[la]siddaṇadēva-Chōḷamahārāja ruling Rēnāḍu seventy, Kanne three-hundred and other districts from Vallūrapura. He is stated to have levied tribute from Kāñchī. A certain Chōḷajīya-Paṇḍita is stated to have granted some vṛitti-lands to Prōlajīya. The Sēnabōva Mācharasa wrote and Bomōja engraved the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . svastisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kaṁciyaṁ kappavaṁ koṁḍa bhuja
baḷavīra nalasiddaṇadēva cōḷamahārā
jaru vā koṁḍu sāmaṁ
sakati mulikima
nāṟumaṁ he laṟunū
rēnāḍeḷpattumaṁ kaṁne muṁnūṟumaṁ
gāgi duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷana
yiṁ vallūrapurada nelavīḍinoḷu suka
saṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamiralu
sakavaruṣa 1114 neya parīdhāvisaṁvatsa
rada caitra suddha pāḍiva sōmavāradaṁdu māca
jīya ga cōḷajīyapaṁḍitaru sauḷū
ra śrī śvarada vṛttiyara prōlajīyaṁge dhā
rāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi yācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyā
gi modalādaśēṣamahā
janaṁgaḷa saṁnidhānadalu sauḷūra jīyapaṁ
muṁḍana maga māceṇa
lūra bōlaya
gāvuṁḍarggaṁ mahā
janaṁgaḷa saṁnidhānadaliralu dattiyaṁ
koṭṭu śilāśāsanaṁ māḍisi dharmmapra
tiṣṭheyaṁ māḍidanu barada sēnabō
vana mācarasanu kaṁḍarisidaṁ baṁmōja .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdha
rāṁ saṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.402 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
